title: oc-stack-forge pack
description: A coverage pack — a language, framework, deploy target, or mobile platform that oc-stack-forge can recommend or scaffold. One pack.yml per directory under skills/oc-stack-forge/packs/. See CONTRIBUTING.md for authoring guide.

id.description: Stable identifier. Must match the directory name (skills/oc-stack-forge/packs/<id>/pack.yml) and be globally unique across all kinds. Drives the coverage flag id: skills.coverage.<id>.enabled (for kind in {language, framework, mobile}).

displayName.description: Human-readable label for oc-stack-forge UI and ADR documents. Defaults to id with hyphens replaced by spaces.

kind.description: Pack category. Drives required fields, adapter-graph relations, and whether a coverage flag is generated (language|framework|mobile|vector-db yes; deploy-target no). kind=vector-db packs (pgvector, pinecone, …) are leaf nodes selected by oc-rag-forge; they carry no adapter-graph edges.

since.description: opchain release when the pack landed (semver). Surfaced in /changelog groupings and stale-pack detection.

language.description: Pack id of the underlying language. REQUIRED for kind=framework. The adapter graph follows this edge.

frameworks.description: For kind=language: canonical frameworks built on this language. Each entry must be a real pack id of kind=framework. The adapter graph follows these edges (and validates the reverse direction matches each framework's `language` field).

testRunner.description: Canonical test runner command name (vitest, pytest, jest, gotestsum, etc.). REQUIRED for kind=language.

buildCmd.description: Canonical build invocation for the pack. Used in oc-stack-forge scaffolds and ADRs.

defaultPlatform.description: Pack id of the deploy-target oc-stack-forge picks by default for this pack. Must be a member of supportedPlatforms.

supportedPlatforms.description: Deploy-target pack ids known to work with this pack.

mobilePlatform.description: REQUIRED for kind=mobile. The mobile platform the pack targets. iOS + Android are native; Flutter + React Native are cross-platform.

langRef.description: Relative path (from pack.yml) to a language reference doc. Soft cap 50KB per ref, hard cap 100KB.

frameworkRef.description: Relative path to a framework reference doc.

deployRef.description: Relative path to a deploy reference doc.

testRef.description: Relative path to a testing reference doc.

mobileRef.description: Relative path to a mobile-platform reference doc.

vectorRef.description: Relative path to a vector-DB reference doc (kind=vector-db). Soft cap 50KB, hard cap 100KB.

deprecated.description: REQUIRED when status=deprecated. Identifies the replacement and when the deprecation took effect.

since.description: opchain release in which the pack was deprecated.

replacement.description: Pack id that replaces this one. Must exist with status != deprecated.

notes.description: Optional migration notes shown in oc-stack-forge advisories.
